title: Aechmea sphaerocephala
taxonomy: Aechmea sphaerocephala belongs to the family Bromeliaceae and is a species of flowering plant. This epiphytic plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Aechmea sphaerocephala is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Poales, family Bromeliaceae, genus Aechmea, species A. sphaerocephala. The plant is characterized by its distinctive spherical inflorescence and air-purifying abilities. Aechmea sphaerocephala is a popular ornamental plant due to its unique appearance and low maintenance requirements.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as the ability to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues.
